name: 7-Hydroxymitragynine
summary: 7-Hydroxymitragynine entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: preclinical.
description: 7-Hydroxymitragynine is cataloged as indole alkaloid. Reported mechanisms: potent mu-opioid receptor agonism; higher potency than mitragynine preclinical.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
